title: HITL Timeout Behaviour
hypothesis: A timed-out HumanReviewResponse is treated identically to a rejection — it triggers replan, and always-timeout escalates.

result.summary: Experiment failed with unhandled exception: FixturePlanBuilder.with_task() got an unexpected keyword argument 'data_required'
errors: TypeError: FixturePlanBuilder.with_task() got an unexpected keyword argument 'data_required'
